narration_text: Awake at 2 a.m.? Try this 60-second reset. First, breathe in: The Lord is my shepherd. Breathe out: I lack nothing. Psalm 23:1. Now place your fear in God’s hands. Breathe in: I present my requests to You. Breathe out: Your peace guards my heart. Philippians 4:6-7. Last round: Breathe in: Do not fear, I am with you. Breathe out: You strengthen and uphold me. Isaiah 41:10. Here’s the reframe: Nighttime thoughts are loud, but not always true. God’s promises are louder, and always true. Jesus, quiet my mind, slow my body, and surround me with Your peace. Amen.
